items.title: Dame Jayne-Anne Gadhia appointed Chair of the Financial Reporting Council
items.summary: Dame Jayne-Anne will take on the role from September.

items.summary: This framework brings together existing published material to provide more clarity on the principles applied when assessing Horizon Shortfall Scheme Appeals (HSSA) claims.

items.title: Government brings British Steel into public ownership to protect UK steelmaking
items.summary: The Government has today (16 July) taken British Steel into public ownership to protect the future of steel production in the UK.

items.title: Hundreds more schools to save on bills as government solar drive slashes millions off energy costs
items.summary: First wave of schools to get government-funded solar will save £220 million on their bills to reinvest in children’s education.

items.title: Carbon Budgets
items.summary: A carbon budget places a restriction on the total amount of greenhouse gases the UK can emit over a 5-year period. The UK is the first country to set legally binding carbon budgets.

items.summary: A roadmap setting out the government’s vision for a clean, flexible, consumer-focused electricity system.
